name: Skeletal Growth Process
description: Skeletal Growth Process process visualization. This process flowchart outlines key steps, checks, and outputs.
mermaid:
graph TD
    A11[Cartilage Template] --> B11[Chondrocyte Proliferation]
    B11 --> C11[Ossification Center]
    C11 --> D11[Osteoblast Differentiation]
    D11 --> E11[Bone Matrix Deposition]
    E11 --> F11[Mineralization]
    F11 --> G11[Bone Remodeling]
    G11 --> H11[Growth Plate Activity]
    H11 --> I11[Longitudinal Growth]
    
    style A11 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style B11 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style C11 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style D11 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style E11 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style F11 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style G11 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style H11 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style I11 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

sources.title: Programming Framework: A Universal Process Visualization Methodology
sources.notes: Process visualization: Skeletal Growth Process. Created using the Programming Framework methodology.

sources.title: RELATIONSHIP OF THE CROWN GROWTH ACTIVITY AND THE RADIAL INCREMENT OF THE SCOTS PINE SKELETAL ORGANS
Role of Growth Hormone in the Promotion of Linear Skeletal Growth
sources.authors: Ohlsson, Claes; Isgaard, Jörgen; Lindahl, Anders; Isaksson, Olle G. P.
sources.journal: The Somatotrophic Axis and the Reproductive Process in Health and Disease
